title: LeoTweaks 3D String
description: Makes String and Tripwire 3 dimensional and more Visible. Can also show Tripwire Status Blockstate!
body:
**Changes String to be 3D! Will help you spot them easily!**

---

- Normal String: **Grey Dotted**
- Tripwire: **White Dotted**
- Powered Tripwire: **Pink Dotted**
- Disarmed Tripwire: **Light Teal Dotted**

![Just a Tripwire by the sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41a2d1b560631ce17bd76da69ca34398c4a3f7d8.png)

**Compatible with other String visibility resource packs, you can also manually configure the string textures to be whatever you want (including solid blocks) in: minecraft/textures/block**
